description: The 2020 debate over the use of hydroxychloroquine for COVID-19 treatment. What began as a hopeful potential therapeutic turned into a highly polarized political controversy regarding scientific validity and presidential interference.

key_events.description: Presidential endorsements lead to widespread initial interest and supply shortages.
Large-scale clinical trials (e.g., RECOVERY) find no benefit and potential safety risks.
FDA revokes emergency use authorization (EUA) citing lack of efficacy.
Medical boards issue formal guidance advising against its use for COVID.

calibration_notes: Measures the impact of political polarization on clinical drug acceptance and eventual consensus formation.
